title: P1(3) — wire missing staff lifecycle verbs (start_review/resolve/accept/retire/reopen/escalate/apply)
business_reason: The gap analysis found many control modules had their lifecycle 'gutted' to only close/archive because the transition generator's STATUS_ACTION map lacked verbs for under_review/resolved/accepted/retired/reopened/escalated/applied. Reviews couldn't be started, exceptions/incidents couldn't be resolved, escalations/reopens/apply-change were unreachable.
brain_skills: Skills: 04 Lifecycle, 08 Security. Master loop: extend the generator maps, regenerate, guards enforce from-states.

param_14.question: Generate the remaining staff lifecycle actions.
param_14.answer: Added to BOTH STATUS_ACTION maps: under_review->start_review (write), resolved->resolve (write), accepted->accept (approve), retired->retire (write), reopened->reopen (write), escalated->escalate (write), applied->apply (approve). Regenerated: start_review now on 28 services, resolve 7, apply 7, escalate 4, retire 4, reopen 3, accept 2. gen_guards constrains every new action to its workflow from-states; approve-class verbs (accept/apply) require a reason.
param_14.answer_source: lifecycle_states.json across modules (statuses existed; verbs were missing)
param_14.security_implications: P0.1 guards constrain each new action to valid from-states; approve-class verbs reason-gated.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: per-domain EFFECTS for some verbs (e.g. apply_correction re-points children; escalate creates a task) are tracked for the relevant P1/P2 module CRs; this wires the actions + guards + audit.

principles_pass.P0.6: one map addition completes lifecycle coverage across ~30 entities
principles_pass.P0.1-reuse: from-state enforcement via the guard pipeline

functional: new actions generated on the right services; guards constrain from-states
regression: full e2e: 27 passed + 2 cold-start flakes that pass alone (02 CRM, 07 finance) = 0 real failures; unit 166/166; tsc clean

verification: tsc clean; unit 166/166; full e2e green (2 cold-start flakes confirmed passing alone); drift clean.

known_followups.verb_effects: per-domain effects for apply/escalate/resolve in module CRs
known_followups.flaky_coldstart: first-test-after-dev-start flakes (02/07) — consider a Playwright retry for cold start
